## Summary

- [ ] Summarize the documentation change in 1-3 bullets.

## Tests

- [ ] List the checks you ran.
- [ ] Call out any checks you intentionally skipped.

## Risks

- [ ] Note grounding gaps, stale context risks, or output areas that need extra review.

## Reviewer Focus

- [ ] Point reviewers to the highest-signal generated artifacts or assumptions.

## Docs PR Checklist

### Skills used

- [ ] List every PAAL skill used for this run.

### Source context files

- [ ] List exact files from `project-context/`, `org/skills/`, and `paal-core/references/` used as inputs.

### Output artifacts

- [ ] List every changed file under `docs/`.
- [ ] Confirm no files outside intended scope were generated.

### Acceptance checks

- [ ] Output follows selected skill structures.
- [ ] Output is grounded in listed source context.
- [ ] All generated artifacts are markdown files.
- [ ] No file inside `paal-core/` was edited.
- [ ] Changes are submitted through PR (not direct push to protected branch).
